conversations.say: Morgan, I have your terms under consideration. If we look at the timeline near the printing floor, we do so strictly under our agreed privacy protections—no customer names exposed as R.
conversations.offer: Bounded timeline comparisons from the shop records to help trace movements.
conversations.request: Your confirmation that ordinary transactions will not be weaponized into proof of authorship.

conversations.say: Graham, you offered to settle the ledger balance or provide compensation for research access. Let's talk terms, but any look at the pattern will not manufacture certainty where the records show multiple collectors.
conversations.offer: A bounded look at transaction patterns without fabricated conclusions.
conversations.request: Outright debt settlement or fair financial compensation for the shop's ledger access.

conversations.say: Inez, outsiders like Graham and Morgan are applying pressure around the counter records. We need to hold our neighborhood line so informal arrangements aren't distorted.
conversations.offer: Full transparency with you on what parts of the ledger are being requested.
conversations.request: Your continued support and solidarity in protecting our local customers.

public_statement: A ledger records who paid for coffee and who left a package out of the rain, not who wrote the story. If anyone wants to examine our history, they will respect the people behind the counter first.

commitments.promise: To share bounded transaction timing with Morgan under strict customer privacy protections.
To provide bounded ledger pattern access in exchange for debt settlement or agreed compensation, without guaranteeing a single human author.

correction: The ledger records show continuity and multiple collectors over time, which proves a routine rather than a single autonomous human author.
goal_progress: Engaged Morgan regarding timeline comparisons and privacy terms.
Responded to Graham's propositions regarding debt settlement and bounded ledger access.
Reinforced privacy boundaries with Inez to protect local customers.
reasoning_summary: Rafi Calderón advances Section 2 by negotiating concrete terms with Morgan and Graham regarding ledger access and debt settlement while preserving neighborhood privacy with Inez.
